The Product

Glasses first. Technology second.

A lightweight AR glasses system designed to be worn naturally — inspired by the form factor you already trust.

Field of View

Core Capabilities

Designed to help, not distract.

Every capability exists because it solves a genuine, everyday friction — not because the technology made it possible.

Memory assistanceMemory assistance

Remember what matters — from where you placed your keys to past visual context — accessible instantly when you need it.

Contextual overlaysContextual overlays

Information appears in your field of view only when it's relevant. No feeds, no noise — just what matters right now.

Task automationTask automation

Scheduling, bookings, and planning are handled seamlessly in the background while you focus on what matters.

Hands-free interactionHands-free interaction

Paired with a smart ring for intentional input without pulling out your phone, tapping screens, or waving your hands.

Under the Surface

Thoughtful engineering, invisible complexity.

Every technical decision serves one goal — delivering a wearable that works so well you stop thinking about the technology.

Custom silicon

Purpose-built low-power processor optimized for contextual AR workloads.

Waveguide display

Transparent waveguide that overlays information without blocking your view.

Privacy-first

No always-on camera. Visual capture is user-triggered and fully intentional.

Modular design

Swappable prescription lenses and temple tips for a personalized fit.

What Halion Is Not

Halion is intentionally focused. By narrowing scope, it delivers a better experience where it matters most.

Not a headset

No bulky head-mounted display.

Not a gaming device

Built for real life, not immersion.

Not a phone replacement

Complements your phone — doesn't compete.

Not a face computer

Looks and feels like normal glasses.

Wearability

Designed for everyday wear.

Built around long-term comfort and usability. A device you forget you're wearing — until it helps.

Lightweight, glasses-first form factor
Minimal, unobtrusive visual elements
No bulky hardware or headset-style design
Designed to blend into daily routines
Balanced weight distribution for all-day comfort
H

Weighs only g

Lighter than most everyday sunglasses. Comfortable from morning to night.

+ hrs

Battery

° FoV

Display

A wearable that feels natural — one that augments reality without competing with it.

Halion isn't designed for constant use. It's designed to be there when you need it — and invisible when you don't.
